_comment: Project-shared Claude Code settings. Committed to git. Hooks here are MERGED with user-local hooks in .claude/settings.local.json (both run). See tools/hooks/*.{sh,py} for the scripts. PostToolUse + Stop/SubagentStop wire the tooling-error forced-fix system: tooling_error_guard.py detects KNOWN tooling/shell failures (CRLF, WSL, broken worktree symlinks, missing deps) and raises an incident; tooling_incident_stop_guard.sh refuses to end the turn until it is resolved via 'python3 tools/resolve_tooling_incident.py'. See docs/tooling_incidents.md and the debugging-discipline memory rule.
